seo.title: Mes de Más
seo.description: Mes de Más will help you look, feel and live better… in just one month!

trainers.bioBodi: Idalis is an NASM certified personal trainer and creator of Beachbody’s Spanish-language workout program Mes de Más® and 30 Day Breakaway®, a running and resistance training program designed to get you 5K-ready in record time. Take her live strength, cardio, core, and cycling classes to start sculpting a slimmer, stronger, more athletic body today!

data.descriptionShort: Mes de Más will help you look, feel and live better… in just one month!
data.descriptionLong: Hit your goals, lose weight and learn how to live a better life in just one month by adopting simple changes that Idalis Velazquez will introduce in your daily routine.

modules.categories: Cardio, Bodyweight Training, Core, Slim & Sculpt, Recovery, Mobility & Flexibility

modules.title: Is Mes de Más Right for Me?
modules.content: Mes de Más is for anyone who wants to get results in a month’s time just by adding a few healthy habits to each day. Lose weight and feel better fast using a simple formula anyone can follow: more movement, plus more nutritious food, more water, and more sleep…equals more results. All the workouts are in Spanish and Idalis even made the meal plan with her Latino community in mind, so you can enjoy the foods you know and love while getting the results you want.

modules.title: What Are the Workouts Like?
modules.content: Idalis brings the positive vibes in 24 super-effective, short workouts that leave you feeling confident and looking amazing. You’ll do a mix of cardio and resistance 6 days a week–no two workouts are the same and none is longer than 30 minutes. You’ll use your own body weight to focus on key areas, increasing in intensity as the weeks go by.

modules.title: Tools and Equipment
modules.content: Read the Mes de Más Quickstart Guide to prepare for the program and download the Workout Calendar to see the day’s workout and track your progress. The Mes de Más Tracker and Nutrition Guide and accompanying Introduction to Nutrition videos will show you how to eat to optimize your results. All you need is a yoga mat for the workouts–you can use a sandbag to intensify some moves but it’s not required.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Idalis is an NASM certified personal trainer and creator of Beachbody’s Spanish-language workout program Mes de Más® and 30 Day Breakaway®, a running and resistance training program designed to get you 5K-ready in record time. Take her live strength, cardio, core, and cycling classes to start sculpting a slimmer, stronger, more athletic body today!

o2pJdBS1SphrVUahQKOsco.descriptionLong: Find out how Mes de Más works, and why it’s the perfect program for you.
